pages.text: $(thing)紙張$()由加工過的$(l:mechanics/crops#papyrus)紙莎草$()莖部製作、由$(l:mechanics/papermaking#parchment)動物生皮$()製成，或經由$(l:mechanics/papermaking#paperfromwood)特定木材的繁瑣加工程序$()取得。紙張用於製作$(thing)書本$()與$(thing)地圖$()等書寫材料。
紙莎草必須先用$(thing)小刀$()切成條狀。
接著將紙莎草條浸泡在裝滿$(thing)水$()的$(l:mechanics/barrels)大桶$()裡。
接著將浸泡後的紙莎草條用織布機編織製作$(thing)粗紙$()。最後放置在原木上進行$(l:mechanics/leather_making#scraping)刮除$()來製作$(thing)紙張$()。
下一頁講述有關羊皮紙的造紙程序。

$(thing)羊皮紙$()由$(l:mechanics/leather_making)刮製獸皮$()製作。過程需要幾種不同物品。首先是$(thing)浮石$()。浮石能在$(l:the_world/geology)火山$()附近的地面拾取或用$(l:mechanics/sluices)洗礦槽$()與$(l:mechanics/panning)淘金盤$()淘洗含有安山岩、流紋岩或英安岩的沉積礦物取得。
pages.title: 羊皮紙

pages.name: 浮石
pages.text: 地上的浮石
將浮石、鍛造錘與刮製獸皮合成，就能得到$(thing)預製獸皮$()。
將預製獸皮、$(l:mechanics/glassworking#lime)石灰粉$()、麵粉與新鮮雞蛋混合，便能完成處理程序並產出可用的紙張。
$(thing)木材造紙$()是古老工藝，將堅硬的木頭碎成木漿，再經由壓製、烘乾與刮除來製作紙張。$(br2)注意：較軟的木頭不適合用來造紙。
pages.title: 木頭造紙

pages.text: 首先要找到硬木：$(br2)金合歡$(br)梣木$(br)山楊木$(br)樺木$(br)黑檀木$(br)栗木$(br)山核桃木$(br)楓木$(br)橡木$(br)紅木$(br)懸鈴木

pages.title: 剝皮硬木
pages.text: The process begins by stripping the $(thing)Hardwood$()'s bark off to expose the internal fibers of the log, You can strip the log by placing it down and right clicking it with an axe

pages.title: Hardwood Strip
pages.text: Next, the stripped wood is shaven with an axe to obtain $(item)Hardwood Strips$(). This can be done using an Axe or more sophisticated methods

pages.title: Soaked Hardwood Strip
pages.text: Then, the individual strips are soaked in a $(l:mechanics/barrels)Barrel$() of $(thing)Water$(). This $(thing)debilitates the structural integrity$() of the $(thing)wood$() so it can be $(thing)broken down further$()

pages.title: Hardwood Pulp
pages.text: Afterwards, utilize the $(l:mechanics/quern)Quern$() to break down the soaked strips into $(item)Hardwood Pulp$()

pages.title: Piling up the Pulp
pages.text: While the quern gives you small piles of pulp, you'll want to combine them together in a $(thing)Workbench$(). More sophisticated methods of crushing the strips yield higher amounts of pulp

pages.title: Breaking down the Pulp
pages.text: Before the pulp can be processed further into paper, it needs to be broken down further by $(thing)Boiling it with Lye$() in a $(l:firmalife/oven_appliances#vat)Vat$() or a $(l:mechanics/pot)Pot$().

pages.title: Pressing the Pulp
pages.text: After broken down by boiling it with Lye, the $(item)Thermochemically Treated Hardwood Pulp$() can be pressed down into a sheet of $(item)Soaked Unrefined Paper$()
You can utilize an $(l:mechanics/anvils)Anvil$() to beat down the pulp into a sheet

pages.title: Stomping in Barrel
pages.text: Alternatively, you can stomp the Thermochemically Treated Hardwood Pulp in a $(l:firmalife/wine)Stomping Barrel$()
The final step is $(l:firmalife/drying)Drying$() the $(item)Soaked Unrefined Paper$() into $(item)Unrefined Paper$(), Which then can be Scraped into $(item)Paper$() as shown before.

pages.title: Cutting Steps...?
pages.text: Advancing in the Tech-Tree will allow you to create paper from wood with less overall steps, check $(thing)EMI$() for the different approaches you can take for making paper with wood.
